promptDescription: - **wordstream** — animated word-stream visualization showing how word frequencies evolve across time periods, organized by topic/category. Each category occupies a flowing band where word font sizes reflect frequency; hover highlights matching words across all streams; click a word to extract its individual stream with an animated transition, click the stream background to restore. Best for exploring vocabulary evolution, keyword trends across topics, or how language in a text corpus shifts over time. Spec: { "type":"wordstream", "title":"...", "data":[{"date":"2020", "words":{"Topic A":[{"text":"word","frequency":15,"id":"unique_id","topic":"Topic A"}]}},{"date":"2021","words":{...}}], "topWord":40, "minFont":10, "maxFont":25 }. Notes: (1) data[] needs at least 2 time periods. (2) Each period has a date string label and words keyed by topic name. (3) id is auto-generated if omitted but must be unique across all words if provided. (4) Sort words by frequency descending; topWord (default 40) caps words shown per topic per period. (5) frequency must be a positive number.
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='520px';function loadD3v4(cb){if(window.d3&&d3.keys){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src='https://d3js.org/d3.v4.min.js';s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}function loadWS(cb){if(typeof window.wordstream==='function'){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/huyen-nguyen/maker@main/lib/wordstream.min.js';s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}loadD3v4(function(){loadWS(function(){var data=spec.data||[];if(!data.length){wrap.style.padding='12px';wrap.style.color='#888';wrap.textContent='Wordstream: spec.data must be a non-empty array of {date, words:{topic:[{text,frequency}]}} objects.';return;}data.forEach(function(period,ti){Object.keys(period.words||{}).forEach(function(topic){(period.words[topic]||[]).forEach(function(w,wi){if(!w.id)w.id='t'+ti+'_'+topic.replace(/\W+/g,'_')+'_'+wi;if(!w.topic)w.topic=topic;});});});if(spec.title){var ttl=document.createElement('div');ttl.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;color:#333;';ttl.textContent=spec.title;wrap.appendChild(ttl);}var W=wrap.offsetWidth||800;var H=(wrap.offsetHeight||520)-(spec.title?28:0);var svg=d3.select(wrap).append('svg').attr('width',W).attr('height',H);window.wordstream(svg,data,{topWord:spec.topWord||40,minFont:spec.minFont||10,maxFont:spec.maxFont||25,tickFont:spec.tickFont||12,legendFont:spec.legendFont||12,curve:d3.curveMonotoneX});});});}
